description: AutoStream provides automated video editing tools for content creators.

policies.refund_policy: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support during business hours.
policies.free_trial: A 7-day free trial is available for both plans.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing period.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports exports for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and Facebook.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect at the start of the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 7-day free trial for both the Basic and Pro plans. No credit card required.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV input formats. Exports are available in MP4 and MOV.
